other_observers: Leslie Larson, Craig Larson, David Such, Joel Such; Leslie Larson was original finder.
specific_location: Larson House, 2921 Stagecoach Trail, Lyons, CO 80540 (Lat 40.310488, Long -105.302763)
description: Typical woodpecker shape. Bill longish, stout, and black. Head beige-gray-brownish with orangish above bill and on chin and backside of head (nape area). Breast/belly same color as head (without the orange highlights). Back/wings black with horizontal white stripes. Undertail coverts white with black centers of feathers.Behaviors: Hopping along tree parallel to trunk or branch in typical woodpecker fashion, pecking at the bark occasionally. Would also fly between different trees on occasion.Call: Did not vocalize.Plumage: adult
